title: What a Godly Man Is Not Waiting For
caption:
God first. Then her.

Not because it sounds like good advice. Because the order changes everything about how you show up.

A man who needs a girlfriend to feel whole will empty any relationship he gets into. When your identity is settled in Christ, you stop dating out of hunger. You're not hunting for someone to fill the gap. You're looking for a woman who's also walking with God.

The quiet years, the building years, the years nobody's watching: those are where God does his deepest work. Don't waste them pining for what comes next.

"Seek first the kingdom of God, and all these things will be added to you." Matthew 6:33.

Save this if you're in the wait.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thevision #scripture #christianity #singlelife
theme: He chases God, not a wife
